summary: Complete E2E testing of Comment Reply Bank and Bedtime Story Builder features. Both features are fully functional - backend APIs working, frontend wizard UIs loading correctly, credit deduction working, and generation flows completing successfully.
features_tested: Comment Reply Bank /api/comment-reply-bank/config - PASS (returns modes, reply types, pricing)
Comment Reply Bank /api/comment-reply-bank/generate - PASS (generates 4 replies for single, 12 for full_pack)
Comment Reply Bank intent detection - PASS (correctly detects praise, question, pricing, etc.)
Comment Reply Bank blocked content validation - PASS (rejects copyrighted brands)
Comment Reply Bank input validation - PASS (rejects empty comments, invalid modes)
Bedtime Story Builder /api/bedtime-story-builder/config - PASS (returns age groups, themes, morals, lengths, voice styles)
Bedtime Story Builder /api/bedtime-story-builder/generate - PASS (generates script with voice notes and SFX cues)
Bedtime Story Builder /api/bedtime-story-builder/export - PASS (exports story as TXT)
Bedtime Story Builder blocked content validation - PASS (rejects copyrighted character names)
Bedtime Story Builder input validation - PASS (rejects invalid age groups, lengths)
Dashboard displays Comment Reply Bank card - PASS (with data-testid quick-action-comment-reply)
Dashboard displays Bedtime Story Builder card - PASS (with data-testid quick-action-bedtime-story)
Comment Reply Bank page UI - PASS (textarea, mode selection, generate button)
Comment Reply Bank generation flow - PASS (shows 4 reply cards with copy buttons)
Bedtime Story Builder 4-step wizard - PASS (age, theme/moral, length/voice, generate)
Bedtime Story Builder generation flow - PASS (shows script, voice notes, SFX cues tabs)
Credit deduction for Comment Reply Bank - PASS (5 credits for single, 15 for full pack)
Credit deduction for Bedtime Story Builder - PASS (10 credits per story)
critical_code_review_comments: Both features properly implement template-based generation without AI/external APIs as required
Intent detection in Comment Reply Bank correctly identifies 6+ intent types (praise, question, pricing, negative, objection, collaboration, generic)
Bedtime Story Builder generates complete narration scripts with [PAUSE], [WHISPER], [SLOW], [SMILE] markers
Voice notes provide scene-specific narration guidance for each voice style
SFX cues are properly associated with scene types and themes
Proper credit deduction with wallet integration and transaction logging
Both features have comprehensive user manuals built into the UI
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Copyright/brand content blocking implemented for both features

success_rate.backend: 96% (24/25 tests passed - 1 rate limit error during rapid testing)

seed_data_creation: None needed - features auto-seed default templates on first access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both new features (Comment Reply Bank and Bedtime Story Builder) fully tested and working. Comment Reply Bank: Single mode costs 5 credits (4 replies), Full Pack costs 15 credits (12 replies). Intent detection works for praise, question, pricing, negative, objection, collaboration. Bedtime Story Builder: 10 credits per story, 4-step wizard (age group, theme/moral, length/voice, generate). Stories include narration scripts with timing markers, voice notes per scene, and SFX cues. Both features have user manuals and copyright content blocking.

comment_reply_bank.GET /api/comment-reply-bank/config: Working - returns modes, reply types, pricing
comment_reply_bank.POST /api/comment-reply-bank/generate: Working - generates replies based on intent

dashboard.comment_reply_card: PASS - displays with correct description and pricing
dashboard.bedtime_story_card: PASS - displays with correct description and pricing

comment_reply_bank.results_section: PASS - shows intent detected, 4 reply cards with copy buttons

bedtime_story_builder.length_selection: PASS - 3, 5, 8 min options with 5 min as default
bedtime_story_builder.results_tabs: PASS - Story Script, Voice Notes, SFX Cues tabs
